creative_brief: Warm, family-focused design with a hero image of fresh beef cuts or a farm scene. Emphasize the craft and quality story.
subject: The beef that changed everything for us
preheader: From Rachel's pastures to your table — no cold storage, no 2,400km journey
body:
Last month, I watched a Sydney family taste our grass-fed beef for the first time.

Their 8-year-old took one bite and said: "Mum, this tastes like the farm smells — like grass and sunshine."

That's what happens when beef goes straight from Rachel's Farm pastures to your kitchen in days, not weeks. No feedlots. No hormones. No 2,400km supermarket journey or 14-21 days in cold storage.

Just cattle raised on regenerative land on the NSW coast, dry-aged by our butcher, then delivered fresh to our Brookvale hub every Monday-Friday.

You can taste the difference. Your kids definitely can.

But here's what most people don't know: this kind of quality-craft farming is expensive to scale. That's why we're opening our equity crowdfunding campaign to families who want to own a piece of the future we're building.

From $50, you can invest in farm-direct food that's priced for everyday families, not just the wealthy. No middlemen. No markups. Just the craft and care that good food deserves.

Join our waitlist and be the first to know when the campaign opens.

This is not financial advice. Consider seeking independent financial advice. Full details in the disclosure document on Birchal.
